form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 8 at Sunshine Coast Cl5 on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Chalice Well with 59.5kg at $5.50. Before that 9th of 11 at Eagle Farm Bm78 on February 28 over 1200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Restonica with 59kg at $21. Watch for him dropping on these late.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Doomben Cg&E Bm70 November 29 over 1200m, soft track; 5 len behind Ser Joh with 59kg at $13. Previously first up; seventh of 10 at Eagle Farm Bm78 August 9 over 1000m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Belegato carrying 57kg at $6. Keep an eye on the betting.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 4 len at Gold Coast Bm75 April 4 over 1000m defeating Flaming Conquest with 56.5kg at $5. The race before that 4th of 7 at Eagle Farm Cl3 on February 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Galactic Star with 60kg at $7. Impressed last start and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 12 at Toowoomba Bm78 on March 27 over 1000m, 3 len behind Acres Away carrying 57kg at $4. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at this track Cl5 on February 12 over 1100m, 0.6 len behind Bravely with 59kg at $1.90. Can do much better this time.

form.formComment: At the latest run came from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track Cl4 April 6 over 1200m defeating Rubydoo carrying 57kg at $4.60. The race before that 5th of 8 at Doomben 3&4yo Bm70 on March 18 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Alpha Bravo with 57.5kg at $16. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at this track Cl5 November 26 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 5.5 len behind Party Spirit with 56.5kg at $4.80. When resuming last campaign second last of 11 at this track Bm65 August 14 over 800m, 4 len behind State In Texas with 60.5kg at $2.70. Expecting a good return.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Eagle Farm Cl3 on February 28 over 1000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Galactic Star with 58kg at $3.50. Second run from a spell sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 0.6 len behind Impact Zone carrying 58.5kg at $2.40. Handy strike-rate and is a key chance.
